sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ مَعًا لِإِنْجَازِ الْمَشْرُوعِ الْكَبِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenici rade zajedno na završetku velikog projekta.
sentences.translationEn: The employees work together to complete the big project.

sentences.arabic: يَتَبَادَلُ الْفَرِيقُ الْأَفْكَارَ وَالِاقْتِرَاحَاتِ فِي الِاجْتِمَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Tim razmjenjuje ideje i prijedloge na sastanku.
sentences.translationEn: The team exchanges ideas and suggestions in the meeting.

sentences.arabic: التَّعَاوُنُ هُوَ سِرُّ النَّجَاحِ فِي أَيِّ شَرِكَةٍ نَاجِحَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Saradnja je tajna uspjeha u svakoj uspješnoj firmi.
sentences.translationEn: Cooperation is the secret of success in any successful company.
